Edit the wording yourself: open this file in any text editor, find the SLIDES list near the top of the <script> section below, and change the eyebrow, title, or sub text for any moment. Save the file and reopen it in your browser to see the update — no other part of the file needs to change. Titles now wrap and push the rest of the slide down automatically, so longer text won't overlap the line below it.
